title: dodonaea multijuga
intro: Dodonaea multijuga, also known as the many-stemmed hop-bush, is a shrub native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Dodonaea multijuga include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in salves, creams, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote skin health.
